---
title: "5B ELO Calculations"
author: "Desiree Thomas & Kiera Griffins"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load and Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

elo_calcs <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KieraG2026/Project-1--Chess-Tournament/refs/heads/main/tournament_results_final.csv")
```
